Goal: The shop with a blue tent
Instruction: Walk straight along the paved sidewalk, keeping the street on your left and the Starbucks on your right. Continue straight ahead, passing several storefronts, until you reach a crosswalk. Cross the street and enter the pedestrian walkway marked by a series of glowing blue arches. Walk straight along the brick-paved path, passing through the blue arches and under the overhead string lights. Keep the tall building with blue panels on your left. Pass the shop with a white awning on your right, and stop in front of the next shop on your right, which has a blue tent covering its outdoor area. You have arrived at your destination.
